rows.title: Improved performance
rows.description: BusSing is now more responsive across maps, routes, and arrival timing interactions.

rows.title: Destinations on service rows
rows.description: Service rows now show destination details, making it easier to confirm you’re heading in the right direction.

rows.title: ETA Trust Score
rows.description: Users can now see a trust score for arrival estimates, helping you judge how reliable each ETA is
